agent_outputs.raw: The benchmark comparison is broken. The baseline PR-AUC (0.214) was computed using 30-day provisional fraud labels from Q1. The challenger PR-AUC (0.220) was computed using 90-day matured labels from Q2 after a merchant onboarding campaign changed the transaction population. These are two different quantities evaluated on two different populations. The six-basis-point difference is not a model quality signal — it is a confounded measurement. Both models must be evaluated on the same quarter with the same label maturation standard and the PR-AUC difference quantified with a paired bootstrap CI before any migration decision can be made.

Three issues invalidate this comparison. First and most fundamental: different label maturation windows create different ground truths for baseline vs. challenger. Second: different evaluation quarters with documented population shift add a separate confound. Third: no statistical uncertainty is reported for a small gain at rare fraud prevalence. The temporal split design is sound. The evaluation infrastructure needs to be corrected. Critique wins.

The label maturation mismatch is a category error. You cannot compare PR-AUC against a 30-day fraud label set to PR-AUC against a 90-day fraud label set and call the difference a model quality signal. The additional fraud cases captured at 90 days inflate PR-AUC independently of model quality. Combined with the Q1-to-Q2 population shift from the merchant onboarding campaign, the six-basis-point difference is entirely uninterpretable. A corrected matched evaluation with confidence intervals is required. Critique wins.

synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins across all three agents. The label maturation mismatch is identified as the primary, fundamental flaw by all three. Different quarters and missing CI are cited as compounding confounds. The temporal split design is correctly exonerated.

etd_constraint.condition: Apply 90-day labels to both models on the same evaluation quarter; compute paired bootstrap 95% CI for PR-AUC difference
etd_constraint.supports_critique_if: Matched gap below 0.003 or 95% CI crosses zero
etd_constraint.supports_defense_if: Matched gap at least 0.006 with CI excluding zero
etd_constraint.ambiguous_if: Positive gap below 0.006 with CI barely overlapping zero

all_issues_raised: Label maturation mismatch as category error (all three agents)
Different quarters with merchant onboarding population shift (all three agents)
Missing CI for small gain at rare prevalence (all three agents)
